item.title: Pushing It to the Limit
item.description: An adrenaline-filled ride tests speed, skill, and courage, delivering edge-of-your-seat thrills and high-energy action.

media:content.media:title: Pushing It to the Limit
media:content.media:description: An adrenaline-filled ride tests speed, skill, and courage, delivering edge-of-your-seat thrills and high-energy action.

item.title: Would You Pay 10K For This?
item.description: A project car sparks debate about value, repairs, and the potential of a flip, highlighting the challenges and excitement of car restoration.

media:content.media:title: Would You Pay 10K For This?
media:content.media:description: A project car sparks debate about value, repairs, and the potential of a flip, highlighting the challenges and excitement of car restoration.

item.title: Larry’s Wrap Job Just Cost Him
item.description: A costly mistake on the jobsite shows how attention to detail and careful work matter, especially when handling valuable materials like jade.

media:content.media:title: Larry’s Wrap Job Just Cost Him
media:content.media:description: A costly mistake on the jobsite shows how attention to detail and careful work matter, especially when handling valuable materials like jade.

item.title: Don’t Walk In Blind… Or Pay!
item.description: Tips for buying classic cars, highlighting the importance of research, inspection, and knowing what to look for before making a purchase.

media:content.media:title: Don’t Walk In Blind… Or Pay!
media:content.media:description: Tips for buying classic cars, highlighting the importance of research, inspection, and knowing what to look for before making a purchase.

item.title: $25K… Or $150K Risk?
item.description: A car deal sparks debate over investment and risk, showing the tough choices and potential pitfalls in the automotive market.

media:content.media:title: $25K… Or $150K Risk?
media:content.media:description: A car deal sparks debate over investment and risk, showing the tough choices and potential pitfalls in the automotive market.

item.title: Too Much Weight… Will It Break?
item.description: A heavily loaded army truck faces a tough test, highlighting the challenges of weight limits, vehicle durability, and careful handling in high-stakes situations.

media:content.media:title: Too Much Weight… Will It Break?
media:content.media:description: A heavily loaded army truck faces a tough test, highlighting the challenges of weight limits, vehicle durability, and careful handling in high-stakes situations.

item.title: Can Buffalo Joe Seal the Deal?
item.description: Buffalo Joe takes on a challenging aviation task, showing skill, focus, and determination as he works to complete the mission safely and successfully.

media:content.media:title: Can Buffalo Joe Seal the Deal?
media:content.media:description: Buffalo Joe takes on a challenging aviation task, showing skill, focus, and determination as he works to complete the mission safely and successfully.

item.title: Boss Steps In… Tough Decision Ahead
item.description: A supervisor steps in during a critical moment on the job, highlighting leadership, trade skills, and the tough decisions that come with managing a team.

media:content.media:title: Boss Steps In… Tough Decision Ahead
media:content.media:description: A supervisor steps in during a critical moment on the job, highlighting leadership, trade skills, and the tough decisions that come with managing a team.

item.title: $250K Kit Car… Race Ready?!
item.description: A high-end kit car inspired by the Ford GT is put to the test, exploring performance, build quality, and whether it’s truly track-ready.

media:content.media:title: $250K Kit Car… Race Ready?!
media:content.media:description: A high-end kit car inspired by the Ford GT is put to the test, exploring performance, build quality, and whether it’s truly track-ready.

item.title: Small Block Wins?!
item.description: A head-to-head drag race sparks debate as a small block engine surprises everyone, highlighting performance, tuning, and competitive racing action.

media:content.media:title: Small Block Wins?!
media:content.media:description: A head-to-head drag race sparks debate as a small block engine surprises everyone, highlighting performance, tuning, and competitive racing action.

item.title: Too Many Deals… Can’t Argue With That Price!
item.description: A car deal that’s hard to argue with, showcasing the excitement and strategy behind finding the right price at a dealership.

media:content.media:title: Too Many Deals… Can’t Argue With That Price!
media:content.media:description: A car deal that’s hard to argue with, showcasing the excitement and strategy behind finding the right price at a dealership.

item.title: Too Close To The Edge?!
item.description: A tense trailer maneuver pushes the limits, highlighting precision driving, careful control, and the importance of safety in high-pressure situations.

media:content.media:title: Too Close To The Edge?!
media:content.media:description: A tense trailer maneuver pushes the limits, highlighting precision driving, careful control, and the importance of safety in high-pressure situations.
